notes: ElevenLabs Bella voice — natural English spelling throughout. 'Pin on Image' pronounced naturally. Levels: mean ~-17.8dB, max ~-1.2dB. Video 22s, audio tail 23.5s (last clip overruns by ~1.5s — acceptable fade at end).

steps.display_text: A Pin on Image slide lets participants tap anywhere on a custom image to mark their answer.
steps.tts_text: A Pin on Image slide lets participants tap anywhere on a custom image to mark their answer.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Pin on Image from the Unscored section of the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Pin on Image from the Unscored section of the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your spatial question — tell participants exactly what to pin.
steps.tts_text: Type your spatial question — tell participants exactly what to pin.

steps.display_text: Upload your image in the Content panel, then hit Present to go live.
steps.tts_text: Upload your image in the Content panel, then hit Present to go live.

mix_command: ffmpeg -i pin-on-image-trimmed.webm -i s01.mp3 -i s02.mp3 -i s03.mp3 -i s04.mp3 -i s05.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6500|6500[a2];[3:a]adelay=9500|9500[a3];[4:a]adelay=14500|14500[a4];[5:a]adelay=19000|19000[a5];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5]amix=inputs=5:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k pin-on-image-narrated.webm
